name: Barbecued Chicken Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well and reserve in refrigerator, covered tightly. Will keep for up to 2 weeks.
2. Prepare the barbecue sauce:
a. In a saucepan, heat peanut oil over medium heat.
b. Add garlic and onion. Cook until soft.
c. Add remaining ingredients and simmer until thickened.
3. Rub dry rub #1 on the chicken inside and out, making sure to get under the skin as much as possible. Massage the bird well and refrigerate overnight.
4. Prepare the grill with soaked wood chips.
5. Split the chicken in half and cook on the grill over slow heat for 45 minutes or until cooked through.
6. Allow the chicken to cool slightly.
7. Pick the meat off the bone and remove the skin.
8. Chop the chicken lightly and mix with 1 cup of the barbecue sauce.
9. Serve on a white bun with cole slaw.
